title: Putin says he thinks Russia-Ukraine war is coming to an end
summary: Putin stated that the Russia-Ukraine war is coming to an end during comments to reporters. This assertion carries significant weight for potential peace negotiations and geopolitical developments in the ongoing conflict.
content: "I think that the matter is coming to an end," Putin told reporters of the Ukraine war.

zh.title: 普京表示他认为俄乌战争即将结束
zh.summary: 普京在向记者发言时表示俄乌战争即将结束。这一主张对潜在的和平谈判和进行中的冲突的地缘政治发展具有重要意义。

title: S&P 500 extends winning streak to 6 weeks. What drove the stock market gains
summary: The S&P 500 extended its winning streak to six weeks, driven by positive earnings reports, stronger-than-expected economic data, and a major AI partnership announcement. The market momentum reflects investor confidence in corporate performance and AI innovation.
content: Investors cheered positive earnings, economic data, and a high-profile AI partnership.

zh.title: 标普500指数连赢6周。什么推动了股市涨幅
zh.summary: 标普500指数延续了六周的连赢纪录，受积极的收益报告、超预期的经济数据和重大的人工智能合作公告推动。市场势头反映了投资者对企业表现和人工智能创新的信心。

title: These are the fastest-growing jobs for new college graduates — even in this low-hire market
summary: Despite a challenging post-inflation job market for new graduates, certain sectors are experiencing rapid growth and creating opportunities for recent college graduates. The article outlines strategies to help young professionals navigate the competitive hiring landscape.
content: The post-inflation job market has been especially hard for new grads, but there are ways they can help themselves prepare for the search.

zh.title: 这些是应届大学毕业生增速最快的工作——即使在招聘低迷的市场中
zh.summary: 尽管后通胀时期对新毕业生来说就业市场充满挑战，但某些行业正在经历快速增长并为应届大学毕业生创造机会。该文章概述了帮助年轻专业人士在竞争激烈的招聘环境中应对的策略。

title: These long-distance couples are mourning the airline America loved to hate
summary: Long-distance couples and families are mourning the closure of budget airline Spirit, which enabled affordable travel for reunions, relationships, and major life events under $100. The airline's demise eliminates a critical option for maintaining long-distance relationships.
content: ‘There are probably countless weddings, funerals, reunions, weekend getaways and, yes — long distance relationships — that Spirit enabled’ with its flights under $100.

zh.title: 这些远距离情侣在为美国人既爱又恨的Spirit航空的停运而悲痛
zh.summary: 异地恋情侣和家庭正在为廉价航空公司Spirit的关闭而悲痛。Spirit曾提供低于100美元的经济实惠旅行，使人们能够团聚和维系感情。该航空公司的停运消除了维持远距离关系的一个关键选择。

title: As mortgage rates move up to 6.37%, is now a good time to lock in your rate?
summary: Mortgage rates have risen to 6.37% amid continued volatility, creating uncertainty for homebuyers during the spring season. The article examines timing considerations for locking in rates despite ongoing market fluctuations.
content: Volatile mortgage rates have made for a bumpy spring home-buying season

zh.title: 随着抵押贷款利率上升至6.37%，现在是锁定利率的好时机吗？
zh.summary: 抵押贷款利率在持续波动中上升至6.37%，为春季购房者造成不确定性。文章探讨了在市场波动持续的情况下锁定利率的时机选择。

title: Can one bad week ruin your retirement savings? How about three bad years?
summary: Market volatility's impact on retirement savings depends more on investor actions than market conditions themselves, the article argues. It provides perspective on managing retirement funds through downturns rather than being derailed by short-term market swings.
content: It’s not so much what’s happening in the market as what you do about it.

zh.title: 一周的下跌能毁掉你的退休储蓄吗？三年呢？
zh.summary: 文章论证，市场波动对退休储蓄的影响更多取决于投资者的行为而非市场条件。它提供了在市场下跌期间管理退休基金的视角，而非被短期波动所困扰。

title: Get ready to work for 60 years — as living to 100 becomes the new norm
summary: As Americans increasingly live to 100, longer work careers are becoming necessary, requiring fundamental changes to how people approach work, savings, and retirement planning. The expanding older population will reshape economic and social structures across decades.
content: America’s older population is expected to expand in the coming years. That will change how we work, save and live.

zh.title: 准备工作60年——活到100岁成为新常态
zh.summary: 随着美国人越来越多地活到100岁，更长的工作生涯变得必要，这要求人们对工作、储蓄和退休规划的方式进行根本改变。不断增长的老年人口将在数十年内重塑经济和社会结构。

title: Here’s how I turned my kids into ‘thousandaires’ managing their own money by their 18th birthdays
summary: A parent demonstrates how gradual financial responsibility and money management education enabled their children to accumulate significant savings by adulthood. The approach emphasizes the importance of transferring financial control progressively to young adults.
content: At some point, you have to hand over financial control to your newly minted adult.

zh.title: 我是如何让我的孩子在18岁时成为"千元户"并管理自己的财务的
zh.summary: 一位家长展示了如何通过逐步的财务责任和理财教育，使孩子在成年时能够积累可观的储蓄。这种方法强调了逐步将财务控制权转移给年轻成年人的重要性。

title: My niece is on Social Security Disability Insurance. Will she lose her health insurance if I buy her a house?
summary: This addresses a critical concern for SSDI recipients—asset limits can jeopardize healthcare coverage. The question highlights a common dilemma where well-intentioned financial help from family members can inadvertently cost essential benefits.
content: “She has not been able to get approved for a mortgage, so I want to help her.”

zh.title: 我的侄女在社会保障残疾保险上。如果我给她买房子，她会失去健康保险吗?
zh.summary: 这涉及SSDI受益人的关键问题——资产限制可能危害医疗保障。这个问题突出了一个常见的困境，家庭成员善意的财务帮助可能会无意中导致失去必要的福利。

title: Frontier jet hits and kills pedestrian on runway in Denver during takeoff
summary: A Frontier Airlines jet struck and killed a pedestrian on a runway in Denver during takeoff after smoke was reported in the cabin. Pilots aborted the takeoff sequence in response to the emergency.
content: Frontier said that smoke was reported in the cabin of the Airbus A321 and the pilots aborted takeoff.

zh.title: 边疆航空公司飞机在丹佛起飞时撞上并杀死跑道上的行人
zh.summary: 在机舱内报告烟雾后，一架边疆航空公司的飞机在丹佛起飞时撞上并杀死了跑道上的行人。飞行员中止了起飞程序以应对紧急情况。

title: Nvidia embraces role of AI investor, pushing past $40 billion in equity bets this year
summary: Nvidia has invested over $40 billion in AI infrastructure companies this year, positioning itself as a major player beyond chip manufacturing. The company simultaneously signs commercial deals with its portfolio companies, creating comprehensive bets across the AI sector.
content: Nvidia is pouring billions of dollars at a time into companies across the AI infrastructure stack, while also signing commercial deals with them.

zh.title: 英伟达拥抱AI投资者角色，今年股权投资突破400亿美元
zh.summary: 英伟达今年对AI基础设施公司的投资超过400亿美元，将自己定位为芯片制造业以外的主要参与者。该公司同时与其投资组合公司签署商业协议，在AI部门创造全面的投资。

title: There's little chance of a hantavirus global outbreak. What the latest odds say
summary: Prediction markets like Kalshi show minimal risk of hantavirus becoming a global health crisis. Expert assessments suggest the current outbreak is unlikely to reach international scale.
content: Prediction markets like Kalshi show slim chance that the hantavirus outbreak will be of international concern

zh.title: 汉坦病毒全球爆发的可能性很小。最新赔率说了什么
zh.summary: Kalshi等预测市场显示汉坦病毒成为全球卫生危机的风险极小。专家评估表明当前疫情不太可能达到国际规模。

title: U.S. and Iran are no closer to ending war; Tehran's response awaited
summary: U.S. and Iran remain locked in conflict with little progress toward resolution as tensions escalate around the Strait of Hormuz. Recent flare-ups mark the most significant fighting since a ceasefire began a month ago.
content: Recent days have seen the biggest flare-ups in fighting in and around the Strait of Hormuz since a ceasefire began a month ago.

zh.title: 美国和伊朗离结束战争还很远；等待德黑兰的回应
zh.summary: 随着霍尔木兹海峡周围局势升级，美国和伊朗仍陷入冲突，解决方案进展甚微。最近的冲突升级标志着一个月前停火开始以来最严重的战斗。

title: MV Hondius hantavirus outbreak: A luxury expedition cruise boom and new world of remote travel risks
summary: The deadly hantavirus outbreak aboard luxury expedition cruise ship MV Hondius reveals emerging health risks in remote travel. As expedition cruises to Antarctica and the Arctic boom in popularity, the incident underscores overlooked dangers in this growing sector.
content: Remote expedition cruises to destinations like Antarctica and the Arctic are booming, but the deadly hantavirus aboard MV Hondius is a reminder of unique risks.

zh.title: MV Hondius号汉坦病毒爆发：豪华远征游轮繁荣与远程旅行风险的新世界
zh.summary: MV Hondius号豪华远征邮轮上的致命汉坦病毒爆发揭示了远程旅行中的新兴卫生风险。随着前往南极洲和北极的远征游轮日益流行，该事件凸显了这一增长部门中被忽视的危险。

title: Dying with a health savings account can leave a tax bomb for heirs
summary: Non-spouse beneficiaries who inherit a health savings account face substantial tax liabilities upon inheritance. This financial pitfall is often overlooked by HSA holders when planning estates.
content: Non-spouse beneficiaries like children and grandchildren can be on the hook for a big tax bill if they inherit a health savings account.

zh.title: 持有健康储蓄账户去世会给继承人留下税收"炸弹"
zh.summary: 继承健康储蓄账户的非配偶受益人在继承时面临巨大的税收负担。这个财务陷阱在HSA持有者进行遗产规划时常被忽视。

title: AI-powered scam calls are getting more convincing—and more common: 'It was her voice, I know her scared cry'
summary: Artificial intelligence can now convincingly mimic familiar voices within seconds, making phone scams increasingly difficult to detect. The technology poses a growing threat as fraudsters use voice cloning to impersonate loved ones.
content: AI can now mimic a familiar voice in seconds, making scam calls harder to spot.

zh.title: 人工智能驱动的诈骗电话变得更加逼真——也更加普遍："那是她的声音，我听得出她害怕的哭声"
zh.summary: 人工智能现在可以在数秒内逼真地模仿熟悉的声音，使电话诈骗越来越难以检测。随着欺诈者使用语音克隆来冒充亲人，这项技术构成了日益增长的威胁。

title: Introducing the ‘NACHO’ trade: How Wall Street is betting on higher oil prices and persistent inflation
summary: Wall Street has embraced a new trading strategy acronym, NACHO, reflecting bets on elevated oil prices and sustained inflation. The trend highlights how markets are pricing in long-term economic pressures.
content: Wall Street is glomming on to yet another acronym inspired in part by Mexican cuisine.

zh.title: 介绍"NACHO"交易：华尔街如何押注高油价和持久通胀
zh.summary: 华尔街已经采纳了新的交易策略缩写NACHO，反映了对高油价和持续通胀的押注。这一趋势突出了市场如何在长期经济压力中定价。

title: The unsinkable U.S. economy cruises on, despite headwinds from the Iran war
summary: The U.S. economy continues expanding despite macroeconomic challenges stemming from the Iran conflict. Economic resilience is proving stronger than anticipated headwinds.
content: The economy keeps expanding in the face of macro obstacles.

zh.title: 美国经济坚不可摧,尽管伊朗战争的逆风依然
zh.summary: 尽管伊朗冲突带来的宏观经济挑战,美国经济仍在持续扩张。经济的韧性被证明强于预期的阻力。

title: The Iran war will change global energy markets in these important ways, oil executives say
summary: Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has removed nearly one billion barrels from global supply, with shortages intensifying daily. Oil industry leaders warn the conflict will fundamentally reshape global energy markets.
content: Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has resulted in the loss of nearly a billion barrels of oil with the shortage growing worse every day.

zh.title: 石油高管表示伊朗战争将以重要方式改变全球能源市场
zh.summary: 伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁已从全球供应中移除近十亿桶石油,短缺日益加剧。石油业领导人警告该冲突将从根本上重塑全球能源市场。

title: Bank of America says stocks like Apple have plenty of upside following earnings
summary: Bank of America identified five stocks, including Apple, with significant upside potential following recent earnings reports. The analysis suggests these equities have room for further gains.
content: The firm named five stocks that have more room to run following earnings.

zh.title: 美国银行表示苹果等股票在财报后有很大上升空间
zh.summary: 美国银行在最近财报发布后,确认了包括苹果在内的五只股票具有显著的上升潜力。分析表明这些股票仍有进一步上涨的空间。

title: Micron and Qualcomm are among the most overbought stocks this week. Here are the others
summary: A rally in memory chip stocks has driven Micron and Qualcomm to substantial gains but also left them vulnerable to correction. Several high-flying stocks are now showing signs of being overbought.
content: A massive rally in memory chip stocks drove them to huge gains this week, but that's also left some of the highest fliers due for a possible decline soon.

zh.title: 美光和高通等股本周严重超买 还有其他个股
zh.summary: 内存芯片股的上涨推动美光和高通实现大幅增长，但也使它们面临回调风险。多只热门股现已显露超买迹象。

title: The most prestigious job in AI has no description
summary: Major AI companies from Anthropic to startups are hiring for 'member of technical staff' positions that lack clear job descriptions. The vague title reflects ambiguity in how leading AI firms are structuring senior technical roles.
content: Everyone from Anthropic to tiny startups is hiring for the “member of technical staff” — but does anyone know what it means?

zh.title: 人工智能领域最负盛名的职位没有职位描述
zh.summary: 从Anthropic到初创公司，众多主要人工智能公司正在招聘职位描述模糊的"技术员工"职位。这种模糊的职称反映了领先人工智能公司如何组织高级技术角色存在的不确定性。

title: More Americans are buying homes to fit multiple generations: ‘It answered a lot of prayers’
summary: Multigenerational home purchases are rising as Americans seek to house multiple family members under one roof. The trend is expected to accelerate as baby boomers age and families pursue cost-effective housing solutions.
content: Multigenerational living is expected to get even more popular as baby boomers age.

zh.title: 越来越多美国人购买多代同堂住宅："这实现了许多梦想"
zh.summary: 随着美国人寻求在同一屋檐下容纳多个家庭成员，多代同堂住宅购买量在上升。随着婴儿潮一代的老龄化以及家庭寻求具有成本效益的住房解决方案，这一趋势预计将加速。

title: Greg Abel knows Berkshire cold, but some miss the Buffett magic
summary: Greg Abel received mixed reviews in his first annual shareholders meeting as Berkshire Hathaway's CEO, with some investors noting the absence of Warren Buffett's distinctive leadership style. Despite his deep knowledge of the company, Abel's tenure marks a significant leadership transition.
content: Greg Abel is getting decent, if not spectacular, reviews for leading his first annual shareholders meeting as CEO.

zh.title: 格雷格·阿贝尔深知伯克希尔，但有人怀念巴菲特的魔力
zh.summary: 格雷格·阿贝尔在担任伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司首席执行官后的首次股东大会上获得了褒贬不一的评价，一些投资者指出他缺乏沃伦·巴菲特独特的领导风格。尽管阿贝尔对公司有深入的了解，但他的任期标志着一个重大的领导层交接。

title: Americans oppose huge AI data centers in their towns. Tiny ones in their homes may be a different story
summary: Public opposition to large-scale AI data centers is growing, but smaller home-based alternatives may face less resistance as a new model emerges for distributed computing infrastructure.
content: As public support for large-scale data center buildouts declines across the U.S., a new type designed to operate inside individual homes is coming.

zh.title: 美国人反对在自己的城镇建设大规模人工智能数据中心。小型家用数据中心可能会是另一回事
zh.summary: 公众对大规模人工智能数据中心的反对声浪日益高涨，但较小的家庭替代方案可能会面临较少的阻力，因为分布式计算基础设施的新模式正在涌现。

title: Why one of the nation's largest auto lenders isn't worried about high vehicle prices or 'forever loans'
summary: Capital One, a major auto lender, reports stable vehicle cost-to-income ratios despite median car payments nearly doubling from $390 to $525 since 2019. The company's analysis suggests the auto lending market remains financially sustainable despite rising vehicle prices.
content: While median car payments have jumped from $390 to $525 since 2019, data provided by Capital One suggests stability in vehicle cost compared to income.

zh.title: 美国最大汽车贷款商之一为何不担心高车价或"永久贷款"
zh.summary: 主要汽车贷款商Capital One报告称，尽管中位数车贷从2019年的390美元增至525美元，但车辆成本与收入比保持稳定。该公司的分析表明，尽管车价上涨，汽车贷款市场仍保持财务可持续性。

title: These smaller tech stocks are punching well above their weight
summary: Small-cap technology stocks have significantly outperformed their large-cap counterparts, demonstrating strength in the smaller end of the tech market.
content: Shares of small-cap tech stocks have outperformed their large-cap peers by an extreme magnitude.

zh.title: 这些小盘科技股表现出众，远超其权重
zh.summary: 小盘科技股明显表现优于大盘科技股，展现了科技市场小端的实力。

title: U.S. sanctions companies and individuals in the Middle East and China for helping Iran
summary: The U.S. imposed sanctions on 11 companies and 3 individuals across Iran, China, Belarus, and the UAE for providing assistance to Iran.
content: The moves target 11 entities and three individuals based in Iran, China, Belarus and the United Arab Emirates.

zh.title: 美国对中东和中国的公司及个人实施制裁，因其协助伊朗
zh.summary: 美国对分布在伊朗、中国、白俄罗斯和阿联酋的11家公司和3个个人实施制裁，理由是他们向伊朗提供了援助。

title: Revival of Blackberry nostalgia and keyboard fuels smartphone startups
summary: Smartphone startups are capitalizing on nostalgia by reviving the BlackBerry concept with physical keyboards and distinctive square designs.
content: Smartphone startups are bringing back the Blackberry idea through physical keyboards and the classic square-shaped smartphone.

zh.title: 黑莓怀旧情和键盘激发智能手机创业热潮
zh.summary: 智能手机创业公司通过复兴黑莓概念（配备物理键盘和独特方形设计）来利用怀旧情感。

title: China April exports rebound strongly after sluggish March, trade surplus widens
summary: China's April exports rebounded strongly after March's sluggish performance, with the overall trade surplus widening. However, Chinese exporters face growing risks from ongoing Middle East conflicts that could disrupt supply chains.
content: Chinese exporters could face mounting challenges if the Middle East conflict drags on, economists say.

zh.title: 中国四月出口强劲反弹，贸易顺差扩大
zh.summary: 中国四月出口在三月疲弱后强劲反弹，整体贸易顺差扩大。然而，中国出口商面临中东冲突持续可能导致供应链中断的日益增长的风险。

title: How Sir David Attenborough built 'Green Hollywood'
summary: A single city produces 80% of the world's natural history television content, largely through the work and influence of Sir David Attenborough.
content: The city is responsible for 80% of the world's natural history TV shows.

zh.title: 大卫·爱登堡爵士如何打造"绿色好莱坞"
zh.summary: 单个城市生产了世界自然历史电视内容的80%，主要通过大卫·爱登堡爵士的工作和影响力实现。

title: Whisky business: Investors pin hopes on Trump’s Scotch tariff reversal after dire three years
summary: Investors in premium Scotch whisky and cask collecting hope President Trump will reverse a 10% tariff to revive a market that has struggled for three years.
content: President Trump's decision to ditch the 10% tariff on Scotch whisky could boost the market for premium cask collecting.

zh.title: 威士忌生意：投资者寄希望于特朗普扭转苏格兰威士忌关税以度过三年困难期
zh.summary: 高端苏格兰威士忌和木桶收藏的投资者希望特朗普总统取消10%关税，以振兴在三年来一直陷入困境的市场。

title: Lumentum’s fiery stock rally earns it a spot in this hot index
summary: Optical company Lumentum has surged to become the sixth-best performing stock in the S&P 500 this year, earning it inclusion in the Nasdaq-100 index. The strong performance reflects growing demand for optical components in semiconductor and data center markets.
content: Lumentum’s stock performance ranks sixth in the S&P 500 this year. Now the optical company is set to join the Nasdaq-100.

zh.title: 楼美顿股票飙升，跻身热门指数
zh.summary: 光学公司楼美顿股价今年飙升，成为标普500指数中表现第六好的股票，获纳入纳斯达克100指数。强劲表现反映了半导体和数据中心市场对光学元器件需求的不断增长。
